name: Architext 1.7.4 Self-Contained Native Serve
summary: Patch release fixing `architext serve` on a pure off-npm install. The viewer dist is now EMBEDDED into the native binary (rust-embed in architext-serve), so a binary installed by the curl installer or `architext update` is self-contained — it no longer depends on a co-located <exe_dir>/dist that the GitHub-release download lacked. Latent since the 1.7.2 native-install feature; surfaced when serving from a binary after leaving npm. On-disk dist (dev / ARCHITEXT_VIEWER_DIST override / npm co-located) still wins; the release pipeline builds the viewer before compiling the CLI so the embed is populated.
updateSource: Fix verified locally: a release binary (16.3 MB, +2.7 MB from the embed) serves the full viewer with no on-disk dist (ARCHITEXT_VIEWER_DIST pointed at a nonexistent dir) — index.html, the 2.46 MB wasm, and CSS all 200, and the app boots and renders flows in a real browser. release-binaries.yml + publish.yml now build the viewer dist and place it before the CLI compiles (with a pre-compile presence check). Pending merge to develop -> main + just github-release.

required.title: Embed the viewer into the native binary (off-npm serve fix)
required.summary: RCA: serve resolved the viewer from <exe_dir>/dist, which the per-platform npm packages co-locate but the standalone GitHub-release binary (curl installer / architext update) does not include, so a pure off-npm install printed 'Package viewer assets are missing' on serve. Fix: rust-embed bakes crates/architext-viewer/dist into architext-serve; the static handler serves on-disk first (override / npm / dev) then falls back to embedded, and the CLI's missing-assets guard passes when the viewer is embedded. release-binaries.yml and publish.yml build the viewer dist and stage it before the CLI compiles (rust-embed embeds at compile time), with a build.rs guard so non-viewer builds still compile.

deferred.title: Stop co-locating the dist in the npm packages (now embedded)
deferred.summary: With the viewer embedded in the binary, the per-platform npm packages' co-located <exe_dir>/dist is redundant (~2.6 MB per package). Deferral reason: out of scope for the serve hotfix; removing it is a packaging optimization to land once 1.7.4 is verified in the wild, and the on-disk copy is harmless (it simply wins over the identical embedded copy).

workstreams.name: Self-contained native serve
workstreams.summary: Make the native binary serve the viewer with no co-located files, so the off-npm install/update path works end to end.

evidence.label: PR embedding the viewer in the native binary + pipeline
Release binary serves the viewer with no on-disk dist (browser-verified)
